message:
chore: update fsqlite dependency to b6393ca (eprocess fix, type fixes)

Picks up frankensqlite fixes:
- Missing eprocess.rs module (was declared but not committed)
- should_shed priority check (< → <=)
- check_reserved_lock i16/i32 mismatch
- Dead uring-fs cfg-gated code cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
